pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 37 uses SELECT firstname='Robert' WHERE lastname='Baker'
setup_task.sh line 37 queries demographics WHERE lastname='Baker'
setup_task.sh line 42 hardcodes INSERT with DOB='1958-05-14' when creating patient if not found
setup_task.sh line 7 sets PDF_FILE variable to 'Consult_Report.pdf'

setup_task.sh line 16 creates PDF with text 'Cardiology Consultation Report - Robert Baker' containing both keywords. verifier.py lines 64-68 checks for keyword matches in description field, using substring matching (Python 'in' operator)
setup_nosh.sh lines 10-11 define ADMIN_USER='admin'. Line 166 inserts admin user into users table with username='admin'

setup_nosh.sh lines 10-11 define ADMIN_PASS='Admin1234!'. Line 148-150 generates bcrypt hash of 'Admin1234!' and stores in users table. Line 369 confirms 'Admin1234!' is the correct plaintext password for admin user

privileged_info_summary: The task involves uploading a scanned cardiology consultation report to a medical record system (NOSH ChartingSystem) for patient Robert Baker (DOB: 1958-05-14). The synthetic PDF file 'Consult_Report.pdf' contains the text 'Cardiology Consultation Report - Robert Baker'. The admin login credentials are username 'admin' with password 'Admin1234!'. The patient Robert Baker is created during task setup if not found in the database. The system is Hillside Family Medicine practice running NOSH ChartingSystem via Docker.
